_comment: Winner #15 — branch-protection-as-code. The five status checks that MUST be required on the protected branch, and the two deep-tier safety paths whose changes force the gated pier run. These strings are the single source of truth: check_branch_protection.py asserts every one of them still appears verbatim in .github/workflows/evals.yml, so branch protection cannot silently drift away from what CI actually emits. Changing a check name or a safety path is therefore a deliberate two-file edit that the cheap tier notices. Only the STATIC aggregation-gate names are frozen here — never the dynamic per-plugin matrix-leg names, which vary with the repo's paid packs and would deadlock a PR if required.
